content:
🌟 certimate | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automating and simplifying the management of SSL certificates for self-hosted environments through a visual interface.
✨ Key Features: • Automated SSL certificate issuance, deployment, renewal, and monitoring • Self-hosted with full data control and privacy • Zero dependencies, single-click deployment • Low resource usage (~16MB memory) • User-friendly GUI for visual workflow orchestration
📖 Summary: Certimate is an open-source, self-hosted ACME tool that automates the entire lifecycle of SSL certificate management, including issuance, deployment, renewal, and monitoring. It offers a user-friendly GUI, zero dependencies, and low resource usage, making it suitable for various deployment scenarios.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
